steps.title: Use both required goals
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the decline in unique apple varieties and explain why it occurred. A complete answer must show both the loss of varieties and the role of industrial agriculture in narrowing commercially grown crops.

steps.title: Reject partial answers
steps.content: A focuses on the Lost Apple Project rather than explaining the decline. B describes fewer varieties today but omits the cause. D discusses crops too broadly and does not specify apples or the commercial-growth mechanism. The remaining choice includes both the decline and its cause. The answer is C.
